title: Senior Software Engineer
short_description: Highly skilled and motivated software engineer with expertise in data engineering and a strong background in Java, Python, and JavaScript. Experienced in a variety of frameworks, libraries, cloud platforms, and version control systems. Proficient in Agile methodologies and task management tools. Bachelor's degree in Computer Science from BSUIR.
bullets: 10+ years of hands-on experience in software engineering across multiple business domains, with a strong focus on Python backend development and platform engineering over the last 4 years.

Backend & Platform Engineering: Designed and developed microservices and service-oriented solutions, including cloud-native systems on Azure with async processing. Experienced in migrating on-premises solutions to cloud infrastructure.

Technical Ownership: Independently led refactoring efforts to improve maintainability and enable test coverage. Designed library-based approaches to reduce complexity and improve reliability of third-party integrations.
Communication & Visibility: Regularly presented technical progress and solutions to cross-functional audiences of up to 40 people across multiple countries and timezones.
Data Engineering: Hands-on experience with PySpark and Azure Databricks. Learned data engineering from scratch and expanded team capacity in DE tasks.
Wide Technical Range: Proficient in Python and Java, experienced in cloud platforms (Azure), databases, messaging systems, and CI/CD pipelines.

education.name: BSUIR, Bachelor's degree in Computer Science

prizes_appraisals: 2nd diploma diploma of Republic Olympiad in informatics 2010.
Participant of ACM ICPC Belarus and Baltics Regional Contest (ACM 1/4 finals).

bullets: Developed services in service-oriented environments
Designed and implemented new approach (from service to library) to reduce complexity, latency and increase reliability of interaction with ServiceNOW API
Took part in requirements discussion with clients
Took key role in design and development of new solution for automation of ServiceNOW items processing. Embracing cloud-native approach and utilizing Azure services with async processing.
Led a refactor to simplify control flow and isolate responsibilities, enabling effective test coverage and improving maintainability of the codebase.

projects.name: Optimus (Cloud)
projects.description: Cloud native solution for building automations with specific business needs. Highly increased flexibility and variety of supported use cases and technologies in comparison with previous solution. Utilizes Azure services, async processing and part of it designed to be used as a library to be easily integrated into different services.
projects.technologies: Python, AsyncIO, ServiceNow, Ansible, AWX, Azure, Azure Storage (Table, Queue), Pytest, Git, JIRA, Confluence
projects.responsibilities: Initial implementation of the solution, services support and development of new features, bug fixing, providing documentation, participating in requirements discussion and solution design.
